We caught up with Coulson after a fruitful day 1 of Champions week! 3:42 2 2 741

item.title:

Danny Lauby has experience at t
item.description:
Chris Murphy reposteó MODUS Super Series @MSSdarts · 17min “I grew up playing pairs.”
Danny Lauby has experience at the Live Lounge, but can debutant Danny Baggish inspire a win at International Pairs 3?
Watch LIVE and FREE on Pluto TV from 20th April 1 262

item.title: ChrisMurphy180: Chris Murphy @ChrisMurphy180 · 10min Extremely proud of our small team @MSSdarts for what we produce, day in, day out
item.description:
Chris Murphy @ChrisMurphy180 · 10min Extremely proud of our small team @MSSdarts for what we produce, day in, day out.
Today's first live Champions Week show on @PlutoTV — a great example of the standard this talented group can hit.
The standard of play wasn't too shabby either! youtube.com CHAMPIONS WEEK HAS ARRIVED!!! | Live Darts | Series 13 Champions... CHAMPIONS WEEK HAS ARRIVED!!! | Live Darts | Series 13 Champions Week | Group A Session 1Welcome to the MODUS Super Series in 2026. It's Monday!Matches... 2 156

item.title:
